description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 6th Slot none; Weight -; Price 178 gp DESCRIPTION When propelled from a firearm, this +1 alchemical paper cartridge changes the damage to acid damage. If the target takes acid damage from the cartridge, it takes an additional 2d4 points of acid damage for the next 2 rounds or until the acid is neutralized. This damage doesnât stack with multiple shots or with acid arrow. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor, acid arrow; Cost 98 gp
